Build a complete Python implementation of a distributed rate limiter using Redis sorted sets that supports sliding window rate limiting per user, per endpoint, with configurable burst allowances and automatic key expiration.

Write a full Node.js microservice that ingests webhook events from Stripe, verifies signatures, stores events in PostgreSQL with idempotency guarantees, and triggers downstream processing via a job queue.

Implement a Python class that provides a fully functional in-memory relational database engine supporting CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT with JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY, and ORDER BY operations parsed from raw SQL strings.
Build a complete Go implementation of a distributed key-value store using the Gossip protocol for node discovery, eventual consistency, and conflict resolution using vector clocks.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a full server-side rendering engine for a component-based UI framework, including component lifecycle hooks, props passing, and HTML serialization.
Implement a Python script that builds a dependency graph from a directory of Python files by parsing import statements, detects circular dependencies, and outputs a topologically sorted build order.

Build a complete React implementation of a collaborative whiteboard where multiple users can draw, add shapes, and type text, with state synchronized via WebSocket and operational transformation for conflict resolution.
Write a Python class that implements a full text search engine from scratch with an inverted index, TF-IDF ranking, boolean query support, and phrase search using positional indexing.

Implement a Go service that acts as a distributed job scheduler with cron-style scheduling, job persistence in SQLite, worker node registration via heartbeat, and automatic job redistribution on worker failure.
Build a complete Python implementation of a bytecode compiler for a simple dynamically-typed language with variables, functions, loops, conditionals, and closures, producing a custom bytecode format.
Write a full TypeScript implementation of a GraphQL server from scratch without using Apollo or any GraphQL library, including schema parsing, query execution, resolver chaining, and error handling.

Implement a Python script that performs automated database schema diffing between two PostgreSQL databases, generates the minimal migration SQL to reconcile them, and validates the migration is reversible.

Build a complete Node.js implementation of a multi-protocol API gateway that accepts REST, GraphQL, and gRPC requests and proxies them to the appropriate backend microservice with request transformation.
Write a Python class that implements a persistent B+ tree stored on disk with node serialization, page-based storage, split and merge operations, and support for range queries.
Implement a full Go implementation of a TLS-terminating reverse proxy that performs health checks, circuit breaking, and request hedging across a pool of upstream servers.
Build a complete Python implementation of a log-structured merge tree (LSM tree) with memtable, write-ahead log, SSTable flushing, compaction, and bloom filter for negative lookups.

Write a TypeScript implementation of a reactive stream processing library similar to RxJS from scratch, including Observable, Subject, and operators like map, filter, mergeMap, debounceTime, and catchError.
Implement a Python script that instruments a running Python process using sys.settrace to build a dynamic call graph, measure per-function CPU time, and export a flame graph in SVG format.
Build a complete Go implementation of a message queue broker with persistent storage using an append-only log, consumer groups with offset tracking, and at-least-once delivery semantics.
Write a Python class that implements a distributed transaction coordinator using the two-phase commit protocol with timeout handling, participant failure recovery, and transaction log persistence.
Implement a full Node.js implementation of a real-time collaborative code editor backend with operational transformation, cursor position broadcasting, document versioning, and conflict-free merging.
Build a complete Python implementation of a compiler backend that takes a simple AST and generates x86-64 assembly code, including register allocation using graph coloring and basic optimizations.
Write a TypeScript class that implements a full event-driven saga orchestrator for managing long-running distributed transactions with compensation actions on failure.
Implement a Python script that analyzes a PostgreSQL database's query plans using EXPLAIN ANALYZE output, identifies missing indexes, and generates CREATE INDEX statements with estimated impact.
Build a complete Go implementation of a service mesh sidecar that handles mutual TLS authentication, load balancing, circuit breaking, and distributed tracing header propagation.
Write a Python class that implements a multi-version concurrency control (MVCC) system for an in-memory database, supporting snapshot isolation and serializable transactions.
Implement a full React implementation of a code editor component with syntax highlighting for Python and JavaScript, line numbers, code folding, multi-cursor editing, and a minimap.
Build a complete Python implementation of a neural network autoencoder from scratch with encoder, decoder, latent space representation, and training loop for image compression.
Write a Go implementation of a distributed consensus algorithm based on Paxos with proposer, acceptor, and learner roles, including handling of network partitions and node restarts.
Implement a Python script that generates a complete REST API client SDK in multiple languages (Python, JavaScript, Go) from an OpenAPI 3.0 specification file.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a pub/sub message broker with topic wildcards, message persistence to disk, subscriber acknowledgment, and replay from offset.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe ORM from scratch that generates SQL queries from method chains, supports relationships, lazy loading, and database migrations.
Implement a Python class that provides a coroutine-based cooperative multitasking scheduler with task priorities, sleep, yield, and inter-task communication via channels.
Build a complete Go implementation of a distributed cache with consistent hashing, LRU eviction, TTL support, cache invalidation via pub/sub, and a Prometheus metrics endpoint.
Write a Python script that performs static analysis on JavaScript files to detect common security vulnerabilities including XSS, prototype pollution, and insecure deserialization patterns.
Implement a full Python implementation of a columnar storage format similar to Parquet with run-length encoding, dictionary encoding, and efficient predicate pushdown during reads.
Build a complete React Native implementation of a real-time location sharing app with background location updates, geofencing alerts, a live map view, and WebSocket synchronization.
Write a Python class that implements a full HTTP/2 server from scratch using raw sockets, including HPACK header compression, stream multiplexing, and flow control.
Implement a Go service that performs distributed tracing collection, aggregation of spans from multiple services, trace reconstruction, and a REST API for querying traces by service and duration.
Build a complete Python implementation of a reinforcement learning environment and Q-learning agent that learns to play a simple grid-based game from scratch.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a schema-driven code generator that takes a JSON schema and produces fully typed TypeScript classes, validators, and serializers.
Implement a Python script that builds a custom Linux container from scratch using namespaces and cgroups via ctypes, with a chroot filesystem and network namespace isolation.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a streaming ETL pipeline that reads from Kafka, applies transformations including joins across streams, and writes to Elasticsearch.
Write a Python class that implements a persistent red-black tree stored on disk using memory-mapped files with support for insert, delete, and range scan operations.
Implement a full Go implementation of an API rate limiter middleware that uses a distributed token bucket backed by Redis Cluster with automatic failover to local memory.
Build a complete Python implementation of a query optimizer for a relational database that estimates selectivity using histograms and chooses between nested loop, hash, and merge join strategies.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a reactive forms library from scratch with field-level validation, async validators, cross-field dependencies, array fields, and dirty state tracking.
Implement a Python script that decompiles Python bytecode back into readable source code, handling all common opcodes including closures, generators, and comprehensions.
Build a complete Go implementation of a WebRTC signaling server with room management, ICE candidate exchange, SDP negotiation, and reconnection handling.
Write a Python class that implements a graph database engine with node and edge storage, property indexing, Cypher-like query parsing, and shortest path algorithms.
Implement a full Node.js implementation of a feature flag service with percentage rollouts, user targeting rules, A/B test assignment, and real-time flag updates via SSE.
Build a complete Python implementation of a source-to-source compiler that transforms synchronous Python code into equivalent async/await code using AST transformation.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a virtual machine for a stack-based bytecode language with garbage collection using mark-and-sweep and a just-in-time compilation stub.
Implement a Python script that reverse engineers a REST API by intercepting HTTP traffic using mitmproxy, infers request/response schemas, and generates an OpenAPI specification.
Build a complete Go implementation of a time-series database with ring buffer storage, downsampling at multiple resolutions, and a query language for aggregations over time windows.
Write a Python class that implements a full SMTP server from scratch using asyncio, supporting EHLO, AUTH LOGIN, STARTTLS, and storing received emails to a local mailbox.
Implement a full React implementation of a Gantt chart component with drag-to-resize tasks, dependency arrows between tasks, milestone markers, and zoom levels from day to year.
Build a complete Python implementation of a cryptographic library from scratch implementing AES-256-GCM encryption, PBKDF2 key derivation, and HMAC-SHA256 message authentication.
Write a Go implementation of a distributed locking service using Raft consensus with lock acquisition, renewal, release, and automatic expiry on client disconnect.
Implement a Python script that performs automated performance regression testing by running a benchmark suite, comparing results against a baseline, and generating a statistical report.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a multi-tenant SaaS billing system that calculates usage-based charges, generates invoices, handles proration, and integrates with Stripe.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a parser combinator library from scratch with primitives for character matching, sequencing, alternation, repetition, and error recovery.
Implement a Python class that provides a transactional file system abstraction with atomic writes, rollback on failure, copy-on-write semantics, and a journal for crash recovery.
Build a complete Go implementation of a DNS server from scratch that parses DNS wire format packets, resolves queries using a local zone file, and forwards unknown queries upstream.
Write a Python script that builds a personal knowledge graph from markdown notes by extracting entities and relationships using spaCy and stores them in a graph database.
Implement a full Python implementation of a deep learning framework from scratch with tensor operations, automatic differentiation via reverse-mode backpropagation, and a training loop.
Build a complete React implementation of a pivot table component that supports drag-and-drop field placement, multiple aggregation functions, drill-down, and export to CSV.
Write a Python class that implements a distributed snapshot algorithm based on Chandy-Lamport for capturing consistent global state across multiple communicating processes.
Implement a Go service that performs continuous database replication from PostgreSQL to multiple downstream targets using logical replication slots and change data capture.
Build a complete Python implementation of a container orchestration system that schedules Docker containers across multiple host machines based on resource availability and affinity rules.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a streaming JSON parser that processes arbitrarily large JSON files incrementally without loading the entire file into memory.
Implement a Python script that automatically generates integration tests for a REST API by recording real HTTP traffic and replaying it with assertions on response structure and status codes.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a content delivery network edge cache with cache invalidation, stale-while-revalidate, Vary header support, and cache analytics.
Write a Python class that implements a persistent queue with disk-based storage, producer-consumer semantics, message acknowledgment, and dead letter handling for failed messages.
Implement a full Go implementation of a Kubernetes admission webhook that validates and mutates pod specifications to enforce security policies and inject sidecars.
Build a complete Python implementation of a workflow engine that executes directed acyclic graphs of tasks with parallel execution of independent steps and retry logic for failed tasks.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a build system similar to Make that reads a build file, resolves dependencies, determines which targets are stale, and executes build steps in order.
Implement a Python script that performs automated code review by parsing Python files, checking for common anti-patterns, calculating maintainability metrics, and generating a detailed report.
Build a complete Go implementation of a service discovery system where services register themselves with health endpoints and clients receive real-time updates when services come and go.
Write a Python class that implements a full implementation of the HTTP/1.1 chunked transfer encoding protocol for streaming large responses without knowing content length upfront.
Implement a full Node.js implementation of a document database with JSON storage, secondary indexes, MapReduce queries, and a replication protocol for leader-follower synchronization.
Build a complete Python implementation of a static site generator that processes markdown files with front matter, applies Jinja2 templates, generates navigation, and builds an RSS feed.
Write a Go implementation of a network packet capture tool that reads raw Ethernet frames, reassembles TCP streams, and outputs HTTP request and response pairs.
Implement a Python script that performs automated dependency vulnerability scanning by parsing requirements files, querying the OSV database API, and generating a prioritized remediation plan.
Build a complete React implementation of a data table component with server-side sorting, filtering, pagination, column resizing, row selection, and inline editing.
Write a Python class that implements a full implementation of the SSH protocol client from scratch, including key exchange, symmetric encryption, MAC verification, and channel multiplexing.
Implement a TypeScript implementation of a state machine compiler that takes a declarative state machine definition and generates optimized TypeScript code with full type safety.
Build a complete Go implementation of a tracing-based profiler that instruments Go programs using eBPF to capture function call latencies without modifying the target program.
Write a Python script that analyzes a microservices architecture by parsing Docker Compose and Kubernetes YAML files, infers service dependencies, and generates an architecture diagram.
Implement a full Python implementation of a peer-to-peer DHT (Distributed Hash Table) based on the Kademlia protocol with node lookup, value storage, and routing table maintenance.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a GraphQL subscription server using WebSockets, with topic-based filtering, authentication, connection lifecycle management, and backpressure handling.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a full-featured date and time library from scratch supporting parsing, formatting, timezone conversion, arithmetic, and locale-aware display.
Implement a Python class that provides a distributed semaphore using Redis with fair queuing, timeout support, automatic release on client crash, and observability via metrics.
Build a complete Go implementation of a log aggregation pipeline that tails multiple log files, parses structured and unstructured logs, enriches entries with metadata, and forwards to Elasticsearch.
Write a Python script that performs automated load testing by generating realistic synthetic traffic based on a recorded session, scales concurrency incrementally, and plots latency percentiles.
Implement a full React implementation of a drag-and-drop form builder where users can add, reorder, and configure form fields, with live preview and JSON schema export.
Build a complete Python implementation of a chaos engineering framework that injects random failures including network delays, packet loss, and process crashes into a distributed system.
Write a Go implementation of a protocol buffer compiler plugin that generates Go code from .proto files including serialization, deserialization, and gRPC service stubs.
Implement a Python script that builds a recommendation engine using collaborative filtering on user interaction data, with matrix factorization using SGD and an offline evaluation pipeline.
